emails.subject: Re: Eastern - Summary of their Response to PA/ETA
emails.subject_base: Eastern - Summary of their Response to PA/ETA
emails.body: Re: Eastern Summary of their Response to PA/ETA Don't be too hard on him just yet. Remember that we talked about many similar issues here when they first came up. Maybe after we've been through these with him once he will negotiate them in the first case and only bring the tough sticking points to us. Louise Kitchen 01/17/2000 02:25 PM
